ultra: the first card each turn goes into ultra space, after ultra space is full then ending the turn starts the ultra turn, where you don't draw cards normally but the cards from ultra space go into your hand. Some ultra units have cards that have a special effect when played as the first card in the turn (leap keyword), those cards will glow yellow when their effects are able to be activated
horla: leap changes emotions, different emotions have different effects. (anger: final damage increases, sorrow: shielding and healing increases, fear: strength affects are stronger and poison/retaliate application is increased, joy: unused arithmetica and cards carry over to the next round, all sources of aliemus gain are increased) Rouse makes it so her cards have additional effects when their leap is activated besides just changing emotion, and the effect gets stronger based on how many turns it's been since the emotion you're changing into has last been activated
